businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker and 'Physical AI Platform' spanning autonomous driving, robotics, and energy
businessSummary.description: Tesla is transitioning from EV manufacturing to an integrated AI/robotics/energy platform. FY2025 revenue $94.8B (-2.9% YoY), net income $3.79B (-46.5% YoY). Friday close $391.20 (-0.96%). Tesla-xAI joint project 'Macrohard (Digital Optimus)' unveiled; xAI investment converted to SpaceX stake ahead of IPO — formalizing financial ties across Musk's empire. Battery business emerging as the next growth driver.
howTheyMakeMoney: Services & charging (Supercharger network, insurance, OTA upgrades)

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely high valuation. Based on EPS $1.08. Reflects AI/robotics premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 EPS improvement expected but still sector-highest level

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 revenue decline. Concerns about third consecutive year of delivery drops

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Margin compression continues due to price war

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: Solid cash generation. Total cash $44B on hand

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Low return on equity vs. large-cap tech peers

growthDrivers.title: Tesla-xAI Joint 'Macrohard (Digital Optimus)' Project Unveiled
growthDrivers.description: Reuters (3/11): Musk unveiled Tesla-xAI joint project 'Macrohard' targeting software market disruption. Separately, xAI investment converted to SpaceX stake ahead of IPO — formalizing cross-company synergies.

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 Opens Today — Autonomous Driving & Agentic AI in Focus
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA GTC (3/16-19) Jensen Huang keynote. Vera Rubin + Blackwell Ultra B300 announcements expected. Indirect catalyst for Tesla FSD/robotaxi ecosystem. Historically, NVDA +6.4% during GTC week.

growthDrivers.title: China February Sales Surge 91% YoY — 4th Consecutive Month of Growth
growthDrivers.description: Reuters (3/11): Tesla China-made EV sales jumped 91% YoY in February. Low base effect but 4 consecutive months of growth. Rebound signal vs. BYD.

growthDrivers.title: Batteries Are the Real Growth Story — Forbes Analysis
growthDrivers.description: Forbes (3/12): 'Tesla's best growth story isn't robotaxis — it's batteries.' Megapack demand explosion; energy segment is the key to offsetting auto margin decline.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 50%+ US EV market share leader. Software/manufacturing/energy/FSD 8.2B mile vertical integration is the core moat. xAI/SpaceX connection expands the Musk ecosystem.

moats.description: 8.2 billion FSD miles driven. Overwhelming training data advantage over competitors.
In-house battery (4680), custom chips (HW4), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS is the North American EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian depend on Tesla Superchargers.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: Global EV sales leader. Strong price competitiveness. Dominates Chinese market

recentNews.headline: Tesla Converts xAI Investment Into SpaceX Stake — Government Cleared
recentNews.significance: Formalizes financial ties across Musk empire ahead of SpaceX IPO. Indirect SpaceX exposure for Tesla shareholders

recentNews.headline: Musk Unveils Tesla-xAI Joint 'Macrohard (Digital Optimus)' — Software Disruption
recentNews.significance: AI software market entry. Tesla's AI strategy takes concrete shape

recentNews.headline: Forbes: 'Tesla's Best Growth Story Isn't Robotaxis — It's Batteries'
recentNews.significance: Megapack-driven energy business as next growth engine offsetting auto margin decline

recentNews.headline: Reuters: 'Tesla Delivery Slide May Stretch to Third Year'
recentNews.significance: Investors and analysts cutting FY2026 delivery estimates. Cash burn concerns

recentNews.headline: Tesla China February Sales Jump 91% YoY — 4th Consecutive Month of Growth
recentNews.significance: China market recovery signal. Low base effect but positive trend

analystOpinions.notableComment: Hold consensus from 27 analysts. Average target $396 — virtually flat vs current price. TickerNerd median $458; bulls target up to $600.

risks.title: Third Consecutive Year of Delivery Decline Possible
risks.description: Reuters: Investors and analysts cutting FY2026 delivery estimates. Risk of further revenue and profit decline.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation — P/E 387x
risks.description: TTM P/E 387x, Forward P/E 189x. Sharp multiple contraction risk if growth decelerates.

risks.title: NHTSA FSD Investigation — Regulatory Risk
risks.description: NHTSA investigating FSD vehicles. Tighter regulation could delay autonomous driving monetization.

risks.title: Musk Leadership Spread Thin
risks.description: Simultaneously running Tesla, xAI, SpaceX, X (Twitter), DOGE. CEO distraction concerns persist.

risks.title: Intensifying Global EV Competition
risks.description: BYD and Chinese competitors' price advantage. Market share erosion in Europe and Southeast Asia.

buyReasons.title: xAI/SpaceX Ecosystem Integration — New Value Creation
buyReasons.rationale: Macrohard project + SpaceX stake conversion concretizes Musk ecosystem synergies. Tesla stock evolving into an AI/space complex play.

buyReasons.title: Battery/Energy Business — Second Growth Engine
buyReasons.rationale: Megapack demand explosion; energy segment high growth. New revenue stream offsetting auto margin decline.

buyReasons.title: China Sales Recovery — 4 Consecutive Months of Growth
buyReasons.rationale: February YoY +91% surge. Recovery in the world's largest EV market signals global delivery rebound.

buyReasons.title: $44B Cash — Strongest Balance Sheet
buyReasons.rationale: Net cash $29.3B, FCF $6.2B. Overwhelming financial firepower vs competitors for continued R&D and capex.

overallOpinion: Tesla faces real challenges with EV revenue decline (-2.9%) and margin compression (operating margin 4.6%), but has secured new growth axes through the xAI/SpaceX connection and battery business.
P/E of 387x includes AI/robotics/energy 'platform premium,' but risks sharp multiple contraction if third consecutive year of delivery decline materializes.
China February sales +91% is positive, but NHTSA FSD investigation and intensifying global competition warrant caution. Hold at current levels; buying opportunity below $350.

investmentVerdict.summary: Valuation burden vs platform transition expectations in balance. Watch-and-wait recommended until xAI/battery growth becomes tangible.

threads.text:
Musk unveiled Tesla×xAI joint 'Macrohard.' Also secured SpaceX stake.

But reality check: 3rd year of delivery decline fears + P/E 387x.

Meanwhile China Feb sales +91%, Forbes says batteries are the real story.

Buy at $391 or wait? 👉 investory.kro.kr/stock/TSLA/analysis/2026-03-15
